# B2B Starter Pack

**Business model:** Business-to-Business — revenue generated by selling products, software, or services to other companies, with longer sales cycles, higher ACVs, and multi-stakeholder purchase decisions.
**Primary marketing challenges:**
- Multi-stakeholder alignment: decisions involve 3–10 people across procurement, finance, and end-users, all with different priorities
- Long sales cycle: 4–16 week deal timelines requiring consistent, trust-building presence across multiple channels
- ROI justification: buyers must build a business case upward — marketing must arm them with the language to do it

**Disciplines covered:** Paid_Media · Content_SEO · Lifecycle_Email · Social · Landing_Pages

## When to use this pack
Use for SaaS, professional services, manufacturing, logistics, fintech, or any company whose primary customer is another business. Signals: subscription or contract-based revenue, sales team involvement at > $10K ACV, procurement or legal process in the sales cycle, LinkedIn is a primary acquisition channel.

## Pack contents
| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| Paid_Media/PROMPTS.md | Starter prompts for LinkedIn ABM, lead gen forms, and Google Search intent campaigns |
| Content_SEO/PROMPTS.md | Starter prompts for thought leadership, original research, and solution category pages |
| Lifecycle_Email/PROMPTS.md | Starter prompts for multi-touch nurture sequences, sales-aligned follow-up, and renewal |
| Social/PROMPTS.md | Starter prompts for LinkedIn organic content, educational posting, and executive thought leadership |
| Landing_Pages/PROMPTS.md | Starter prompts for demo/trial request pages, solution pages, and case study landing pages |
